role_title: Associate, Dasher & Logistics - Product Operations Strategy & Operations

level_signals: Base comp range $74,800–$110,000 USD consistent with junior IC

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have deep logistics experience – 2+ years in transportation, supply chain strategy, consulting, or operations roles, with experience in carrier selection, SLA design, or network optimization.
You're highly analytical – You are fluent in data and modeling (Excel, SQL, Python, Sigma, or network modeling tools) and use it to ground your decisions.

You're strategic and process-oriented – You can break down challenging problems, build hypotheses supported by data, and implement experiments while keeping our teams aligned and informed with your work.
You're cross-functional – You've led initiatives that align operations, product, and finance around a shared strategy.
You deliver results – You've driven measurable improvements in cost, service, or coverage at scale.
You thrive in scaling environments – You're comfortable operating with ambiguity and building solutions in uncharted territory.

scope.surface: Dasher & Logistics / DoorDash Drive fulfillment platform — warehouse network, transportation cost, carrier and quality strategies
scope.business_model: B2B2C logistics platform serving restaurants, grocers, and retailers
primary_metrics_inferred: Delivery quality / defect rates (e.g. mis-sorts, delay times)
core_responsibilities: Own quality improvement workstreams that address challenging questions within the warehouse network team
Own network transitions that redesign transportation networks through carrier, quality, and cost strategies
Run experiments and operations tests to identify solutions for reducing defects like mis-sorts or delivery delay times
Support execution at scale by translating proven concepts into scalable solutions
Drive analytical rigor by building and owning models that track product launch success, quality metrics, and costs
Build cross-functional relationships by partnering with Logistics, LiveOps, Analytics, Engineering, and Product teams

green_flags: Clear team context and ownership areas described
Broad cross-functional exposure (Logistics, LiveOps, Engineering, Product, Analytics, Finance)
Role on a high-growth platform (DoorDash Drive) with concrete operational scope
Comprehensive benefits package described in detail
red_flags: Location type is unclear — JD does not specify city, hybrid vs. remote vs. on-site for this role
No equity mentioned despite being a tech company role at this level
Role title says 'Associate' but responsibilities suggest fairly complex ownership (network redesigns, carrier strategy) — scope may exceed typical associate level

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Associate' and comp range)

location.type (not explicitly stated in JD body; left as 'unclear')
